# Offstage

> Primary-source research on Zenza Capital, RYO Coin, RYO-CHAN, Club Sparkle, Anthony Diaz, and Lani Dizon. Published in English, Japanese, and Tagalog. Every claim links to a registry, court filing, blockchain record, or archived document.

## English

- [Home](https://www.offstage-archive.org/)
- [Anthony Diaz](https://www.offstage-archive.org/people/anthony-diaz/)
- [Lani Dizon](https://www.offstage-archive.org/people/lani-dizon/)
- [Zenza Capital](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/zenza-capital/)
- [RYO Coin](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/ryo-coin/)
- [RYO-CHAN](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/ryo-chan/)
- [Club Sparkle](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/club-sparkle/)
- [COINHUB](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/coinhub/)
- [One World Holdings](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/one-world-holdings/)
- [Sparkle KK](https://www.offstage-archive.org/entities/sparkle-kk/)
- [Video series (01–07)](https://www.offstage-archive.org/videos/)
- [Manipulation tactics](https://www.offstage-archive.org/tactics/)
- [FAQ](https://www.offstage-archive.org/faq/)
- [Verify yourself](https://www.offstage-archive.org/sources/)
- [Editorial standards](https://www.offstage-archive.org/about/)
